# `api.companies.get_packaging_labor`

> `GET /companies/{companyId}/packaginglabor` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.companies.get_packaging_labor(company_id: str) -> PackagingLabor
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab companies get_packaging_labor <company_id>
```

GET /companies/{companyId}/packaginglabor

## Response

Returns `PackagingLabor`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `companyId` | `Optional[str]` | no | Company UUID |
| `laborRates` | `Optional[list[dict]]` | no | Labor rate entries |
